title: Agent Configuration
description: Configuration for a workflow agent instance. Omits identity, role, skills, and model selection — those are derived from GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL, tasks.md, and workspace.yaml respectively.

watches.description: SSH URLs of workspace repositories this agent watches for eligible tasks.

enabled.description: Kill switch. When false, agent exits 0 immediately without scanning for work.

jitter_max_seconds.description: Maximum random jitter in seconds before a claim commit. De-synchronises concurrent agents.

budget.description: Hard budget limits enforced per task activation.

max_tokens_per_task.description: Maximum tokens (input + output) the agent may consume on a single task.

max_iterations.description: Maximum tool-use loop iterations per task.

enabled.description: Whether to write a JSONL event log for each task run.
